title: 頼りになるイナリワン先輩

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why, for safety reasons, we decided to
attach a lock to the cupboard.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Makes sense! So, you want me to be the one to
install it, right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you sure you don't mind?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Course not! A DIY project like this is a walk in
the park for me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Inari, apologies for the trouble, but could you
come to my room afterwards?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I broke my door during some martial arts training,
and now it's not closing properly.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Got yourself into a mess, huh? No worries! I'll be
right there, so just sit tight!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Inari! My bed's broken!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Again? How many times do I gotta tell ya not to
jump on it!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Sooorry! Soo... you won't fix it for me anymore?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't go givin' me those puppy dog eyes! I can fix
a bed in my sleep! Leave everythin' to me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, move it! If ya stand 'round like that,
you're gonna get smacked by a big piece of
lumber!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
While I'm at it, I might as well make it sturdier
than before!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! A cup of tea really hits the spot after doin'
carpentry work!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You finished it so fast! Everyone on the
disciplinary committee is thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy too! I can use the bed as a trampoline
again!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Go crazy!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I really appreciate your help. If there were only
something I could offer in return...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry 'bout it! Seein' your smilin' face is the
best reward I could get!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I got to do a buncha different jobs, so I
could work out muscles I don't normally use.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It'll probably help me out in racin'! I can't wait to
get on the track next time!
